entries.title: Rika Manifests As A Special-Grade Curse

continuity.sourceBoundary: Jujutsu Kaisen 0 manga prequel material, treated as manga-primary pre-mainline context for the Jujutsu Kaisen Loredeck family.
continuity.notes: Mainline manga outcomes after the prequel should remain in later arc decks unless explicitly needed as bridge metadata.

content.fact: Rika's manifestation gives Yuta overwhelming danger and protection, but it is tied to their curse bond rather than normal shikigami use.
content.injection: When Rika Curse Manifestation matters, enforce this ability constraint: Rika's manifestation gives Yuta overwhelming danger and protection, but it is tied to their curse bond rather than normal shikigami use.
content.notes: Phase 1 generated expansion; requires human canon review before reference release.
